title: github jcob-bd/notebooklm-mcp-cliを調べて、kernel/FUGUEに活用できるか検証せよ。/kernelで。
summary_text: - [docs/notebooklm-skills-profile.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/docs/notebooklm-skills-profile.md): NotebookLM `CLI+skill` operating model, selected skills (required/optional), and non-goals (`no always-on MCP`) as the single profile source of truth. - [docs/kernel-notebooklm-cli-adapter-design.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/docs/kernel-notebooklm-cli-adapter-design.md): Add a short “Done Criteria / Exit Checklist” section so finished state is objectively testable (receipt caps, approval gate, lazy fetch, block conditions, rollout phase). - [docs/notebooklm-live-verification-YYYY-MM-DD.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/docs/notebooklm-live-verification-2026-03-13.md): Record one live or simulated verification run with exact commands, outputs, and fallback evidence (`Claude/GLM availability` handling) to close the implementation loop.
